story.label: Our Story
story.title: Family-Owned, Florida-Proud
story.body1: Founded in 2021, Honest Water Co was built on a single promise: deliver the best water quality at the most honest price. We saw too many families overpaying for inferior systems or being sold products they didn't need.
story.body2: We're a family-owned business dedicated to providing Florida homes with the highest quality water filtration systems. Our commitment to health, wellness, and sustainability drives everything we do — from the NSF-certified materials we use to the way we treat every customer like a neighbor.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: Our water used to leave white residue everywhere — sinks, showers, the coffee maker. Within a week of installation, everything was crystal clear. The team was professional, fast, and explained everything. Best investment we've made for our home.

testimonials.name: Robert J.
testimonials.text: I was skeptical at first but the difference is night and day. My skin doesn't feel dry anymore, the dishes come out spotless, and the water just tastes clean. Installation was done in under 3 hours. Honest Water Co earned a customer for life.

testimonials.name: Linda K.
testimonials.text: We've had our system for 8 months and it's been flawless. Our water heater is running more efficiently, soap lathers way better, and we stopped buying bottled water entirely. The lifetime warranty gave us total peace of mind. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Jane D.
testimonials.text: Incredible results. Our water has never been cleaner!

faqs.question: What is a whole-home water filtration system?
faqs.answer: A whole-home water filtration system filters the water at the main point of entry, ensuring clean, filtered water is available throughout your entire home for drinking, cooking, bathing, and cleaning.

faqs.question: How does reverse osmosis work?
faqs.answer: Reverse osmosis pushes water through a semi-permeable membrane that removes up to 99% of contaminants including heavy metals, chemicals, bacteria, and dissolved solids — leaving you with pure, great-tasting water.

faqs.question: How often should I replace the filters?
faqs.answer: Filter replacement schedules vary by system and usage, but most whole-home systems require maintenance every 6–12 months. Our team will walk you through the specific schedule for your system at installation.

faqs.question: Why should I choose a water filtration system for my home?
faqs.answer: Filtered water protects your family's health, extends the life of appliances, makes skin and hair softer, and eliminates the cost and waste of bottled water. Florida's water is notorious for hardness, chlorine, and contaminants — filtration is essential.

faqs.question: What contaminants does your filtration system remove?
faqs.answer: Our systems remove chlorine, chloramines, lead, arsenic, nitrates, bacteria, hard minerals (calcium, magnesium), sediment, VOCs, and hundreds of other contaminants — all certified by NSF standards.

faqs.question: Will the filtration system affect my water pressure?
faqs.answer: No. Our systems are engineered to maintain your home's normal water pressure. In many cases, removing sediment and buildup actually improves pressure throughout your plumbing.

faqs.question: Do you serve Sanford FL?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sanford is our home base in Seminole County.
